uncertainties: Duo is a third-party MFA provisioning integration (rippling-main: app/duo_provisioning). On the frontend it does not own a dedicated product surface. Admin management lives within the App Management IntegrationDashboard (e.g. /it/integrations/duo) and end-user device enrollment lives in account security settings (Identity/containers/accountSettings/security/components/securitySettings/Duo.tsx).
Treating as a trivial app with empty nav per the Phase 2 convention for apps without dedicated internal navigation.
